name: CM_LIST_SINGLE_SELECT
description: Vertical scrollable list with single selection (radio-style). Selected item shows blue checkmark icon. Items can be enabled/disabled (gray when disabled). Title bar with back arrow. Items 68px height, scrollable viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and selection.
visualForm: Title bar (50px) → scrollable list (190px) with items (68px): checkmark icon (if selected) | label text, disabled items shown in gray
descriptionKo: 라디오 방식의 단일 선택 세로 스크롤 리스트입니다. 선택된 항목에 파란색 체크마크가 표시되며, 비활성화 항목은 회색으로 나타납니다. 타이틀 바와 함께 190px 뷰포트에서 68px 항목을 표시합니다.
descriptionEn: Vertical scrollable list with single selection (radio-style). Selected item shows blue checkmark icon. Items can be enabled/disabled (gray when disabled). Title bar with back arrow. Items 68px height, scrollable viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and selection.
